name: bogibox Golf Apple Valley
about: bogibox Golf Apple Valley is a private golf simulator venue operating on a membership-only basis. The facility provides members with 24/7 access to private golf bays equipped with top-of-the-line TrackMan technology, allowing for customizable scheduling. The environment is designed to be comfortable and welcoming, resembling a private clubhouse for members to enjoy with friends and family.
why_golfers_like_it: Top-of-the-line TrackMan technology for accurate data
Luxurious, comfortable environment akin to a private clubhouse

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service.
No mention of an on-site bar; BYOB status is not specified.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended that members bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a food and drink policy. Members should contact the venue directly for details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes, as this can vary based on simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, bogibox Apple Valley is a members-only club for adults and does not cater to children, as it is designed for a private, luxurious adult environment.
